name: Dopetrope
title: Dopetrope by HTML5 UP
description: Feature-rich multi-page template with dark textured body background and white content areas. Top navigation with dropdown menus. Hero banner with headline and subtitle. Three-column icon intro section (cog, bolt, star icons) with dual CTA buttons. Main content: 6-item portfolio grid (3x2) with image cards, titles, descriptions, and 'Find out more' buttons. Blog section with 2 large post cards featuring images, timestamps, excerpts, and comment counts. Rich footer with: dated news/updates list, about section with image, link lists, social icons row (Facebook, Twitter, Dribbble, Tumblr, LinkedIn), and full contact info. Vibrant pink-red accent color on buttons.

typography.style: Bold to black headings with light body. Tight letter-spacing for compact feel. Multiple weight range for strong hierarchy.

layoutDetails: Centered container (max 70em). Dark textured body with white content panels. Multiple page layouts: left-sidebar, right-sidebar, no-sidebar. Flexbox grid with 3-column portfolio, 2-column blog. Fixed top navigation. Footer uses multi-column grid layout with dates list, about section, link lists, and contact info.
visualStyle: Bold, content-rich, magazine-like. Dark textured body contrasts with clean white content cards. Vibrant pink-red accent on buttons and interactive elements. Card-based portfolio grid. Blog cards with metadata. Rich multi-column footer. Professional but energetic.
